description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: Find a hardcover picture book for ages 3–5 rated at least 4 stars, costing under $20, and add the cheapest qualifying option to your cart with quantity set to 2.

tasks.instruction: Register a new parent account using the provided details, then add two child profiles—one age 4 in the 3–5 range who prefers picture books and one age 9 in the 9–12 range who prefers fantasy—and save the reading preferences.

tasks.instruction: Search for bedtime stories, filter to eBooks under $10 with ratings of at least 4.5 stars and publication year 2021 or later, and add three qualifying titles to your wishlist.

target_names: Sleepy Stars: Dreams over Rainbow Harbor (eBook)

tasks.instruction: Open the first available book series, then the first book in that series, compare its paperback and hardcover editions with ratings of 4+ stars and prices at or below $25, and add the cheaper qualifying format to your cart.

tasks.instruction: From the teachers section, choose any Grade 2 classroom pack under $150 that includes at least 20 copies, add one pack to your cart, then proceed to checkout using the provided school shipping address and select standard shipping.

target_names: Grade 2 Balanced Literacy Classroom Pack (25 Copies)

tasks.instruction: On the events page, filter for free virtual events for ages 8–10 happening between October 1 and October 31, then register for one of them using the provided parent name, email, and one child participant.

tasks.instruction: From your account order history, open your most recent order, select the first book in that order, and submit a 5-star review containing review text of at least 50 characters.
